definitions.text: Collectively, items or material that have been discarded; rubbish, garbage.

examples: My request for a pay rise was refused.

definitions.text: To decline a request or demand, forbear; to withhold permission.
examples: I refuse to listen to this nonsense any more.
I asked the star if I could have her autograph, but she refused.

definitions.text: To withhold (something) from (someone); to not give it to them or to bar them from having it.
To fuse again, as with, or after, heating or melting.
